title: Understanding Net Force
text: To find the net external force exerted on the shell, you need to use Newton's second law of motion, which states that force equals mass times acceleration.

title: Calculate the Force
text: Use the formula $$F=m a$$, where F is the force, $$m$$ is the mass, and a is the acceleration. Substitute the given values: $$m=1100.0$$ kg and $$a=2.4\times{10}^4$$ $$\frac{m}{s^2}$$.

title: Check Your Units
text: Ensure that the units for mass and acceleration are in kilograms and meters per second squared, respectively, to get the force in Newtons.
